title: Phage Buffer
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3tjc8","text":"Can be used for diluting or resuspending phage preparations.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"4bgep","text":"Materials needed:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"88htl","text":"NaCl (MW=58.44)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7rgg9","text":"Tris-Cl (MW=157.64)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2njgv","text":"MgSO4-7H2O (MW=246.47)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":4,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":8,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bdeu0","text":"Milli Q water","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"vfbb","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ag5rt","text":"This buffer can be prepared from powdered chemicals or from pre-made liquid stocks.  It is easiest to prepare from liquid stocks.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b6630","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"498pl","text":"At the least, the final buffer should be 0.2um filtered, however, it is best if it is 0.02um filtered (using Anotop syringe filters) just prior to use.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Bonnie Poulos
